title: Syn (disambiguation)
content:
{{Youmay|"syn"|[[Sin (disambiguation)|the disambiguation page for "sin"]] or [[Jedi Master]] [[Cin Drallig]]}}
'''Syn''' refers to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Risha Synata]], a famous [[Actor|actress]]
**[[Risha Synata's ship]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Andov Syn]]''', a [[Kerestian/Legends|Kerestian]] bounty hunter.
*'''[[Jariah Syn]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].
*'''[[Peccati Syn]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]].
*'''[[Sorzus Syn]]''', a Sith Lord.
*'''[[Zareb Syn]]''', a Human [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]].
